name: Aunt Netties Ranger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the brown sugar and sugar.
2. Add the shortening and mix until well combined.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla.
4. Stir in the baking soda and baking powder.
5. Gradually add the flour, rolled oats, corn flakes, and coconut, mixing until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
6. Form the mixture into small balls and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375-400°F (190-200°C) for 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them.
